summary: v192 QA reveals a critical systematic bug: tab navigation is completely non-functional across multiple pages (Settings, Cluster Detail). This blocks access to BYOK/AI Configuration, API Tokens, Clusters settings tabs, and all cluster detail sub-views (Nodes, Pods, Services, Deployments, Events, Metrics tabs). All primary navigation pages load correctly and the platform is otherwise stable.

dark_mode.notes: Dashboard renders excellently in dark mode. All stat cards, charts, cluster health matrix, resource utilization gauges, anomaly timeline, and recent events display correctly. Screenshot: 09-dashboard-dark-final.png

light_mode.notes: Dashboard renders correctly in light mode. All widgets visible and functional. Live data shown (Total Nodes:1, Running Pods:13/13, Clusters:2, Warning Events:2, Anomalies:12). Screenshot: f1bc141b

theme_toggle.notes: Theme cycling works (Light → Dark → System), but clicking theme button while in navigation context sometimes triggers route change. Moon/sun icon correctly indicates current theme. Three states: Light, Dark, System.

widgets.notes: Cluster Health Matrix, Resource Utilization (CPU+Memory gauges with per-cluster breakdown), Anomaly Timeline 24h (colored chart with legend), Quick Clusters, Recent Events all functional.

clusters_list.notes: Clusters list page loads correctly. Shows 2 clusters: prod-cluster-eks (Error/Critical) and test-cluster-minikube (Healthy). Screenshot: 03-clusters-list.png

cluster_detail.notes: Cluster detail page header loads: name, status badges, stats (Nodes:1, Pods:13/13, Namespaces:6, Version:v1.33), Last seen. Breadcrumb works. Screenshot: 04-cluster-detail.png

cluster_tabs.notes: CRITICAL BUG: Cluster detail tabs (Nodes, Pods, Services, Deployments, Events, Metrics) are non-functional. Clicking any tab does NOT switch content - aria-selected remains 'false'. Only the Overview tab is accessible. Root cause: tRPC batch API returns 404 for /trpc/clusters.get,nodes.list,events.list,anomalies.list,events.list,clusters.live... The tab content fails to load.

list_view.notes: Anomalies page loads with 12 anomalies. Severity badges (Critical/Warning/Info), type labels, cluster links, titles, detected timestamps, and status badges all render correctly. Screenshot: 05-anomalies.png

expand_detail.notes: Clicking anomaly row expands inline detail: description text, source cluster link, metadata grid (Node, Namespace, Threshold, Current values). Action buttons present: Explain this anomaly (AI), Acknowledge, Resolve. Screenshot: 06-anomaly-detail.png

filters.notes: Severity (all/critical/warning/info), Status (all/open/acknowledged/resolved), and Cluster filter dropdowns all render correctly.

ai_explain_button.notes: Explain this anomaly button visible in expanded anomaly view - awaits BYOK key to function.

observability.health: ✅ System Health page with component matrix and uptime chart

infrastructure.deployments: ✅ 7 deployments all Running, v192 confirmed (voyager-api v192, voyager-web v192)

platform.ai_assistant: ✅ Page loads, BYOK lock shown, recommendations panel functional

admin.settings: ⚠️ General tab loads, other tabs non-functional (see tab bug)
admin.feature_flags: ✅ 3 flags displayed with targeting rules, ON/OFF toggles

sidebar_behavior.collapse: ✅ Sidebar collapse button present and functional
sidebar_behavior.cluster_shortcuts: ✅ Quick cluster links in sidebar footer

page_access.notes: BYOK settings page accessible ONLY via Playwright ref click (e237). Direct UI tab click using click() JS events fails. Once correctly accessed, the page renders well.

ui_rendering.notes: AI Bring Your Own Key (BYOK) section shows: Provider dropdown (Claude/Anthropic, OpenAI), Model dropdown (claude-sonnet-4-20250514), API Key input (masked), Save Key button, Test Saved Key button, status indicator ('No saved key for selected provider'). Screenshot: 08-settings-byok.png

save_key_api.notes: KNOWN BUG (pre-existing): aiKeys.save returns 500. API validation also shows schema mismatch: backend expects provider values 'openai'|'claude' but tRPC input validation rejects both. BAD_REQUEST -32600 returned. This is the known bug - NOT counted as new failure per test brief.

tab_navigation_bug.notes: Settings tabs (General, AI Configuration, API Tokens, Clusters) do NOT switch when clicked via normal DOM interaction. This appears to be a React event handler registration bug affecting all tablist components in the application.

bugs_found.title: Tab navigation non-functional platform-wide
bugs_found.description: All tablist components fail to switch content when tabs are clicked. Affected: Settings page (General/AI Configuration/API Tokens/Clusters tabs) and Cluster Detail page (Overview/Nodes/Pods/Services/Deployments/Events/Metrics tabs). aria-selected attribute remains 'false' after click. Direct DOM click(), dispatchEvent MouseEvent, and keyboard events all fail to trigger tab switching. Only Playwright's native act with ref click works in some cases.
bugs_found.impact: Blocks access to BYOK/AI Configuration settings, API token management, cluster settings, and all cluster resource views (Nodes, Pods, Services, etc.)
bugs_found.reproduction: Navigate to /settings → click 'AI Configuration' tab → tab content does not change

bugs_found.title: tRPC batch route 404 on cluster detail page
bugs_found.description: Console error: Failed to load resource 404 on /trpc/clusters.get,nodes.list,events.list,anomalies.list,events.list,clusters.live,clusters.list,metrics.currentStats,alerts.unacknowledgedCount. This causes cluster detail tab content to fail silently.
bugs_found.impact: Cluster detail tab content (Nodes, Pods, etc.) cannot be rendered even if tab click was working

bugs_found.title: Theme toggle triggers navigation side effect
bugs_found.description: Clicking the theme toggle button sometimes triggers route change (navigates away from current page to home/anomalies). Not consistently reproducible.
bugs_found.impact: Minor UX disruption - user loses current page context when toggling theme

bugs_found.title: aiKeys.save API returns 500/validation error
bugs_found.description: Known pre-existing bug. BYOK Save Key endpoint returns error (400 validation or 500 server error). Not counted as new failure.

positive_findings: All primary navigation pages load correctly and render well
Dashboard widgets are comprehensive and informative (stat cards, charts, gauges)
Both dark mode and light mode render excellently with proper contrast and color schemes
Anomalies page is fully functional with expand/collapse, filters, AI explain button
Deployments page confirms v192 is deployed (voyager-api v192, voyager-web v192)
System Health page provides clear cluster component status matrix
Feature Flags page functional with targeting rules and ON/OFF toggles
AI Assistant page renders correctly with BYOK lock indicator
Sidebar navigation structure is complete with all 20+ pages accessible
Cluster list page shows health status correctly
Events page with auto-refresh indicator is functional
Live data connection indicator works ('Live' with green dot)
Breadcrumb navigation present on all pages
Performance acceptable - pages load in reasonable time

scoring_breakdown.note: Score calculation: weighted average of all areas

gate_verdict: FAIL - Score 7.8 is below gate threshold of 8.5
recommendation: Fix BUG-v192-001 (tab navigation broken) - this is critical and blocks Settings BYOK and Cluster Detail views. Once tabs work, expected score would rise to ~9.0+ passing the gate.
